raw_consumer_statement:
Product : Credit card Company : American Express Issue : Billing dispute credit not processed / refund not credited Complaint narrative : I am submitting this complaint regarding American Expresss refusal to credit a refund that was properly issued and documented by the merchant.

On XX/XX/year>, a charge in the amount of {$29000.00} was posted to my American Express credit card. The merchant later confirmed and processed a full refund for this transaction. I have written confirmation and documentation from the merchant showing that the refund was issued, including the refund amount, date, and reference to the original transaction. I submitted this refund documentation to American Express and filed a dispute under credit not processed. Despite providing clear and complete evidence that the merchant issued the refund, American Express denied my dispute and refused to credit the refunded amount back to my account. American Express did not provide a clear or valid explanation for the denial, and the decision appears inconsistent with fair billing practices and American Expresss own dispute resolution standards. As a result, I am being held responsible for a charge that the merchant has already acknowledged and refunded. This situation results in unjust enrichment, as the merchant has processed the refund while American Express continues to treat the charge as owed. I have attempted to resolve this matter directly with American Express through customer service and dispute escalation, but the issue remains unresolved. 
Resolution requested : Immediate credit of XXXX plus all the late fees to my American Express account Correction of my account balance and dispute record Written explanation for why valid refund documentation was previously rejected I am requesting CFPB assistance to ensure American Express properly reviews the submitted documentation and applies the refund in accordance with fair billing and consumer protection standards. 
Thanks XXXX XXXX
